emitters.evidence: file-local TypeScript syntactic or stable semantic diagnostic
emitters.jurisdiction: full JS/TS scans with a valid repository tsconfig

emitters.evidence: AST-backed any assertion, explicit any annotation, or non-null assertion
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: AST-backed empty or log-only catch block
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: AST-backed placeholder Error throw, exported action contract with an explicit empty or future implementation, or public query method on a concrete class that ignores all inputs and returns only a constant empty result
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: source read proves a production JavaScript or TypeScript file contains only whitespace
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: AST-backed async callback passed to the unshadowed global Promise constructor
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and async Promise executor construct

emitters.evidence: AST-backed async callback passed to a synchronous method on a statically recognized array
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source with array-literal or explicit array-type receivers
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and async array-callback construct

emitters.evidence: AST-backed bare call to an unshadowed locally declared async function
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and local async call site

emitters.evidence: AST-backed removal wrapper that forwards the same arguments to the inverse registration method
emitters.jurisdiction: single-statement listener lifecycle wrappers in production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: AST-backed unanchored character-class regex used by a named allowlist in an explicit invalid-value branch
emitters.jurisdiction: whole-value validation in production JavaScript and TypeScript source

emitters.evidence: AST-backed explicit focused-test call
emitters.jurisdiction: JavaScript and TypeScript test files
emitters.remediationUnit: test file and focused call form

emitters.evidence: AST-backed process environment assignment inside a test callback
emitters.jurisdiction: JavaScript and TypeScript test files
emitters.remediationUnit: test file and mutated environment key

emitters.evidence: at least two independent AST function metrics exceed conservative thresholds
emitters.jurisdiction: named functions in production JavaScript and TypeScript source
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and stable function identity

emitters.evidence: TypeScript name resolution proves that an imported binding has no references
emitters.jurisdiction: resolved imports in JavaScript and TypeScript source with a valid compiler environment

emitters.evidence: TypeScript compiler diagnostic proves that a private class member is unused
emitters.jurisdiction: private members in JavaScript and TypeScript source with a valid compiler environment

emitters.evidence: TypeScript compiler diagnostic proves that a statement is unreachable
emitters.jurisdiction: JavaScript and TypeScript source with a valid compiler environment

emitters.evidence: completed VerificationRun command status plus structured or normalized bounded diagnostic output
emitters.jurisdiction: repository-native lint, test, typecheck, and build commands
emitters.remediationUnit: structured diagnostic, normalized command failure, or location-specific source signal

emitters.evidence: normalized security-classified result from a repository-local SARIF 2.1 report tied to the current EvidenceGraph
emitters.jurisdiction: explicitly ingested repository-native security scanner output
emitters.remediationUnit: stable SARIF fingerprint or normalized scanner rule, location, and message identity

emitters.evidence: normalized npm audit v2 advisory joined to package-lock installed paths and scopes
emitters.jurisdiction: explicitly ingested repository-local dependency audit output
emitters.remediationUnit: package, affected range, and advisory identity

emitters.evidence: embedding duplicate_candidate inference in CapabilityEvidenceGraph
emitters.jurisdiction: explicit embedding-similarity graph builds

emitters.evidence: resolved import target
emitters.jurisdiction: base source hygiene

emitters.evidence: resolved import target
emitters.jurisdiction: base source hygiene

emitters.evidence: scanned file path
emitters.jurisdiction: base scan contract

emitters.evidence: ownership hint
emitters.jurisdiction: repository model completeness

emitters.evidence: strongly connected component in the resolved repository import graph
emitters.jurisdiction: runtime imports among production repository files

emitters.evidence: resolved repository module with high incoming and outgoing dependency counts
emitters.jurisdiction: value and type imports among production repository files

emitters.evidence: declared grammar and observed structure
emitters.jurisdiction: ratified grammar packs only

emitters.evidence: deterministic debt marker
emitters.jurisdiction: production source and disabled tests

emitters.evidence: semantic judgment report
emitters.jurisdiction: production source selected for semantic analysis

emitters.evidence: deterministic dependency_flow facts identify a loop-selected candidate, conditional exit, and post-loop return of the mutable selection
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source where repeated dependency lookup can replace a selected candidate before return
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and dependency-selection control flow

emitters.evidence: current source-matched semantic finding or deterministic cache_flow fact proving that a memoized result branch depends on an outer parameter omitted from its key
emitters.jurisdiction: production source selected for semantic file understanding where cached derived output is visibly read and written, plus getFactoryWithDefault callbacks with parameter-sensitive return branches
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and cache-entry or cache-key contract boundary

emitters.evidence: current source-matched semantic finding or structured cleanup_flow lifecycle-wait contract
emitters.jurisdiction: production source selected for semantic file understanding, plus explicit lifecycle functions with visible fail-fast aggregate or sequential waits
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and lifecycle cleanup sequence

emitters.evidence: deterministic error_flow facts identify either a compound guard with distinct downstream identity mappings or an Error-like construction that keeps a meaningful cause behind a default message
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source where visible failure causes, message construction, and downstream identity handling can be compared
emitters.remediationUnit: source file and error-routing control flow

emitters.evidence: current source-matched semantic finding classified as option-propagation, informed by deterministic spread, override, fallback, and callback context
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source selected for semantic file understanding where an existing option and a potentially absent override can be compared

emitters.evidence: resource_flow facts identify request-scoped values retained on connection-owned state or by reusable socket listeners without a matching release in a fresh EvidenceGraph
emitters.jurisdiction: production JavaScript and TypeScript source where socket, connection, or server owners retain visible request/reply objects
emitters.remediationUnit: connection-owned resource or listener and its request lifecycle boundary

emitters.evidence: current source-matched semantic finding informed by a deterministic scope-model classifier and its unmodeled lexical boundaries
emitters.jurisdiction: JavaScript and TypeScript source transformers with visible identifier rewriting, scope resolution, and lexical-boundary classifiers

emitters.evidence: exports, resolved consumers, and declared roots
emitters.jurisdiction: production source with framework and generated exemptions

emitters.evidence: capability, ownership, and sharing declarations
emitters.jurisdiction: repositories with declared ownership

emitters.evidence: declared grammar and observed symbol name
emitters.jurisdiction: ratified grammar packs only

emitters.evidence: declared anti-pattern and observed structural signal
emitters.jurisdiction: applicable grammar tier
